mapper.select: SELECT SUM(weight) AS totalWeight, COUNT(*) AS behaviorCount, MAX(behavior_time) AS lastBehaviorTime FROM user_behavior WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT behavior_type AS type, COUNT(*) AS count, SUM(weight) AS totalWeight FROM user_behavior WHERE behavior_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY behavior_type

SELECT product_id AS productId, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS userCount, SUM(CASE WHEN behavior_type = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS viewCount, SUM(CASE WHEN behavior_type = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS favoriteCount, SUM(CASE WHEN behavior_type = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS purchaseCount FROM user_behavior WHERE behavior_time BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} AND duration >= #{minDuration} GROUP BY product_id HAVING COUNT(*) > 5 ORDER BY purchaseCount DESC
